---
title: "Week 4: R programming with LLMs"
---

```{r}
week <- 4
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## What you will learn this week

* Using LLMs to assist with R programming

## Pre-class activities

* [The ellmer R package](https://ellmer.tidyverse.org/)
* [Hadley Wickham on ellmer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ctc2kx3LxG8)
* [AI-powered data science using Positron Assistant](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrN-FMcOsOA)



```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
show_assignments(week)
```
